bird.name: Palawan scops owl
bird.summary: The Palawan scops owl (Otus fuliginosus) is an owl endemic to the Philippines only being found on the island of Palawan. It is found on tro…

relations.subject: Palawan scops owl
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Palawan scops owl
relations.evidence: This downlisting is not a result of this species increasing in number, but rather its demonstrated tolerance to disturbed, secondary forest habitat (i.e., the species' rate of decline is slower than previously expected, when population decline was directly associated with the loss of primary forests). This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of legal and illegal logging, mining and conversion into farmlands through slash-and-burn or other methods
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
